next_action: Keep public copy as Public Launch Ready only and require owning-system evidence for operational claims.
rationale: Polished public copy can be present-tense, but it does not prove customers, payment, fulfillment, rights, or hosted-session availability.
internal_summary: Public-copy polish must not be promoted into Operational Launch Ready proof.

suggested_response.subject: Operational proof still needs owning-system evidence
suggested_response.body: The public copy can stay polished, but operational claims need current proof from the system that owns the claim.
